subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My glory! Thy remembrance hath been, and shall ever remain, before the Wronged One. Thy grief hath caused sorrow to the Ancient Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی ذکرت نزد مظلوم بوده و خواهد بود حزنت سبب حزن مالک قدم
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consolation and comfort, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action
